steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content: For a linear function $f(x)=mx+b$, the slope is $$m=\frac{f(1)-f(0)}{1-0}=\frac{12-8}{1}=4.$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $f(x)=12x+8$ — slope is 12, but the slope should be 4. Eliminate.
  • B) $f(x)=4x$ — gives $f(0)=0$, not 8. Eliminate.
  • C) $f(x)=4x+12$ — gives $f(0)=12$, not 8. Eliminate.
  • D) $f(x)=4x+8$ — gives $f(0)=8$ and $f(1)=12$. Keep.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
